title: Savory Tunisian Datterini Tomato Tagine
description: A tangy and flavorful Tunisian dish featuring datterini tomatoes, perfect for a date night, with a cheese pull and ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the pita bread cubes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Spread the pita bread cubes on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes, or until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the halved datterini tomatoes, tomato paste, vegetable broth, and dried oregano to the skillet.
Stir to combine, then bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese and cook until melted and well combined.
Serve the tagine hot, topped with crispy pita bread cubes.
